modularity.note: Clear separation between modules. Some cross-imports between collection/analytical layers.

portability.note: Paths configurable via trevor_config. Still requires Linux + Python + reportlab + matplotlib.

observability.note: Dashboard, health checks, heartbeat, operational report all exist. No real-time alerting.

test_coverage.note: 4 test files exist. ~3,000+ in Hermes. Critical gap for regression safety.

documentation.note: Module docstrings exist. No external documentation. No API reference.

runtime_resilience.note: Font fallback (3 tiers). PDF text fallback. No email fallback. No offline mode.

behavioral_change.note: Trevor has not changed behavior from accumulated experience. Pipeline runs identically each day.

adaptive_prompts.note: Collection intelligence injects confidence adjustment into prompts. Memory context injected when available.

self_repair.note: REPAIR_REGISTRY handles 4 issue types. Static map — does not learn which repairs work.

learning_loop.note: Brier scores are logged but never queried. No behavioral change from calibration data.

prioritization.note: Dynamic prioritization runs. Theatres ranked by volatility + significance + gaps.

capability_gaps.description: No notification if pipeline fails silently at 2am. Telegram alert on failure is highest ROI observability improvement.
If Gmail API is down, brief is lost entirely. AgentMail or webhook fallback needed.
If DeepSeek API is unreachable, pipeline produces nothing. Cached assessment re-publication would prevent total failure.
Brier scores logged. No behavioral feedback. Critical for improving forecast accuracy over time.
Trevor does not change behavior between runs. No skill creation from experience. This is the single biggest gap.
Retrieval-conditioned prompts exist. FTS5 store has entries. Assessment generation has not fired since population.
Language detection exists in source inventory. No translation pipeline. Local-language sources scored but not ingested.
Agent JSON posted to Moltbook agents submolt. Could be extended to other platforms.

fake_autonomy_systems.detail: Flag is set when stale narratives detected. No prompt variation consumer reads it. Half-implemented.
Brier scores recorded. briefometer detects drift. No behavioral change has occurred. Need resolved KJs first.
1 skill exists. Registry exists. Skills are passive files with no runtime influence.
Collection intelligence injects confidence adjustments. Prompt varies based on collection quality. Epistemic state computed but assessment generation has not fired since.

proposed_improvements.proposal: Wire Telegram alert on pipeline failure
proposed_improvements.rationale: Highest observability gap. If pipeline fails at 2am, no one knows.
proposed_improvements.expected_impact: First indication of failure moves from user asking 'where is my brief' to system telling user

proposed_improvements.rationale: FTS5 store has entries. Assessment generation has not fired since population. One pipeline run activates retrieval conditioning.
proposed_improvements.rollback: Trivial — code path exists, just needs production trigger
proposed_improvements.expected_impact: Prompts will differ based on prior narrative context

proposed_improvements.rationale: If Gmail API is down, brief is lost. AgentMail provides alternative delivery path.
Trevor has never created a skill from experience. Nudge system exists but not wired.
proposed_improvements.expected_impact: Behavioral evolution — Trevor would create skills from successful repairs

meta_assessment.weakest_dimension: Behavioral change (1/10) — no learning from experience
meta_assessment.best_roi_improvement: Wire Telegram alert on pipeline failure (value=85, difficulty=low)
meta_assessment.days_since_behavioral_change: Never (system has never adapted from experience)
